titleStmt.title: SII 17.327: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 327. (A.R. No. 298 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north, east and south bases of the central shrine in Kāḷahastīśvara temple.

This inscription begins with the praśasti “Tirumagaḷ pōla” etc., and records the gift of 14(3/4) kaḻañju and one kuṉṟi of gold to the priests of the sanctum sanctorum (tiruvuṇṇāḻigai-pperumakkaḷ) of the temple of Tirukkāḷattidēva for cleaning and decorating the premises in the shrine of Maṇikkeṅgai Mādēvar with the annual interest of 2 kaḻañju, 4 mañjāḍi and one piḷavu on the endowed amount at the rate of 1 piḷavu per kaḻañju per monthThis works out to 15 per cent per year.by Taṇiyal-aṅgāḍiyāṉ Iḷañjiṅgaśeṭṭi, the kiḻāṉ of Nāgimaṅgalam. The duties of worship in this shrine were exclusively enjoined on the priests of the temple of Tirukkāḷatti-mahādēva.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷpolap perunilaccelviyun taṉakkeyurimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkeraḷak kāntaḷūrc cālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkai nāṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu ṉuḷampapāṭiyun taṭikai vaḻiyuṅ kuṭamalaiṉāṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭikai pukaḻtara viḻa maṇṭalamum miraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai yilakkamun tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟi taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷarūḻi Ellāyāṇṭu
ntoḻutakai viḷaṅku miyāṇṭe ceḻiyarai tecukoḷ śrīkovirācarācakecaripanmaṟki yāṇṭu 2 10 4 Āvatu tirukkāḷattitevarai Ārātikkun tiruvuṇṇāḻikaip peru makkaḷukku Ittevar tevatānam mummuṭicoḻapurattu viyāpāri nāki maṅkalaṅkiḻāṉ taṇiyalaṅkāṭiyāṉ Iḷañciṅkacceṭṭiyeṉ maṇikkeṅkai mātevarai Ārātikkavu n=tiruala(k)kun tirumeḻukkiṭavuṅ kuṭutta pon patiṉāṟ kaḻañce mukkāle kunṟi Ippon piḷavu palicaiyā lāṇṭuvarai Irukaḻañce nālu mañcāṭiyum piḷavum poliyūṭṭukkāka
cantrātityavarai tirukkāḷatti mahādevarai Ārātikku muṟai yuṭaiyavarkaḷe Ārātikkak kaṭavarkaḷ Itu panmāheśvararakṣai Idhanmarakṣippāṉ śrīpātam Entalaimelaṉa Idhanmattukku cuhitañ ceyya niṉaippārStops here; Only a few letters are wanting at the end.
Digital edition of SII 17.327 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
